notes:
quy means regulation or rule, but you almost never use it alone. It’s a Sino-Vietnamese root that shows up inside compound nouns.

You’ll usually see it in words like quy định (regulation), quy tắc (rule), or nội quy (internal rules). You don’t say “một quy” — you count the full word, like một quy định.  

Close buddies: luật (law – stronger, legal level) and quy tắc (rule – more general). Think of quy as the “rule/regulation” building block inside bigger words.

definitions.es: Un término utilizado para describir algo que es lindo o adorable.
definitions.en: A term used to describe something that is cute or adorable.
definitions.vi: Một thuật ngữ được sử dụng để mô tả điều gì đó dễ thương hoặc đáng yêu.

exampleSentences: Anh phải tuân thủ quy của công ty khi làm việc ở đây.
Mỗi lớp học đều có quy riêng để giữ trật tự.
Chị ấy luôn nhắc nhở mọi người về quy an toàn trong phòng thí nghiệm.
notes_md:
**quy** means *regulation* or *rule*, but you almost never use it alone. It’s a Sino-Vietnamese root that shows up inside compound nouns.

You’ll usually see it in words like **quy định** (regulation), **quy tắc** (rule), or **nội quy** (internal rules). You don’t say “một quy” — you count the full word, like *một quy định*.  

Close buddies: **luật** (law – stronger, legal level) and **quy tắc** (rule – more general). Think of **quy** as the “rule/regulation” building block inside bigger words.
exampleSentencesTranslated: You must follow the regulation of the company when working here.
Every classroom has its own regulation to maintain order.
She always reminds everyone about the safety regulation in the laboratory.
